subject: [PATCH v4 09/14] mm/userfaultfd: add RWP fault delivery and expose UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch adds support for read-write protection (RWP) in the Linux kernel's userfaultfd feature. It introduces a new fault delivery mechanism that notifies userspace when RWP-protected pages are accessed, allowing users to clear the protection using the UFFDIO_RWPROTECT ioctl. The patch also exposes the UFFD_FEATURE_RWP feature and adds support for anonymous, shmem, and hugetlb memory types. It works by modifying the fault handling code in various kernel modules, including huge_memory.c, hugetlb.c, and userfaultfd.c, to deliver RWP faults to userspace when necessary.
